phase.name: Local AI portability and daily-use integration

model_runtime.message: Phase 6 is in progress through IMP-059. Offline Ollama session import, explicit text-only loopback capture, the accepted bounded local-portability migration drill, the deterministic shutdown escape bundle, and the bounded selected-history ChatGPT conversations.json source adapter are implemented. PORT-001, PORT-003, bounded PORT-013, and PORT-015 pass; PORT-014 has synthetic CI evidence only and still requires private manual acceptance. The complete Phase 6 gate, target-specific application replacement, and stable general anti-lock-in remain incomplete.
